title: Integrate with GNU Radio for real-signal validation
description: Create GNU Radio out-of-tree (OOT) module exposing gf2-coding decoders as processing blocks. Includes C FFI layer, GNU Radio blocks for LDPC/BCH/Viterbi, GRC visual programming definitions, example flowgraphs, and validation with captured RF signals. Target: 10-50x speedup over existing GNU Radio FEC blocks.
